بےفکر۔

GitHub / deploy

Deploy it locally.

self-host it. customize it. solo dev, or small teams.

↓
Anonymous board

Create a board now.

No account wall. No setup ritual. Make a board, share the link with anyone.

Create →
See features

Can your project management tool do this?

جی ہاں، ہم اردو بولتے ہیں

multilingual support

Use Scrumboy in اردو and many other languages.

open-source

100% free, self-hosted, secure and private solution.

realtime collaboration

Real-time collaboration & instant board updates.

sticky wall

Brainstorming, notes, and freeform planning, using Postbaby.org style canvas.

anonymous boards

Instantly create a board, with a unique sharable link. Share with anyone to collaborate.

MCP integrations

automate using AI agents & tools via Claude, etc.

PWA + notifications

Native Android and Push notifications

voice commands

Control your board with natural voice commands.

2FA, OIDC/SSO

Use with OIDC providers such as Keycloak & Traefik.

customization

Light/dark themes, wallpapers, keybindings, & custom tags.

auditing support

durable, append-only history and clear accountability.

markdown + mermaid

Use Markdown and Mermaid diagrams in task notes

Scrumboy is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Scrum.org, Scrum Alliance, Inc., or any other organization associated with Scrum training or certification, nor is it endorsed or affiliated with the Mermaid diagramming and charting software.
